title: Evangelion Manga volume 10 in stock on Amazon
display_title: Evangelion Manga volume 10 in stock on Amazon
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Manga volume 10 in stock on Amazon!             Quote Post by HanjiZoe18 » Wed Oct 23, 2013 10:15 pm Link: http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/1421511606/ref=oh_details_o00_s00_i00?ie=UTF8&psc=1 For the longest time, volumes 9 and 10 of the Evangelion manga have been considered rare finds, with online prices easily in the hundreds. But Amazon seems to have gotten more volume 10!

[]: Re: once-rare Evangelion Manga volume 10 in stock on Amazon!             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 23, 2013 11:25 pm HanjiZoe18 wrote: For the longest time, volumes 9 and 10 of the Evangelion manga have been considered rare finds, with online prices easily in the hundreds

[]: Re: once-rare Evangelion Manga volume 10 in stock on Amazon!             Quote Post by HanjiZoe18 » Wed Oct 23, 2013 11:28 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: This is not true. One of the idiotic things about Amazon is the people who list "rare" books for exorbitant amounts of money that don't remotely reflect what people are willing to pay in the free market. You're much better off looking at eBay sold listings to accurately gauge how much people are actually willing to pay. And a quick check shows people paying about $40 for #9 and $20 for #10.

[]: Re: once-rare Evangelion Manga volume 10 in stock on Amazon!             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 24, 2013 12:29 am HanjiZoe18 wrote: For months I was looking on ebay and such for volumes 9 and 10 but I found ridiculous prices

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Oct 24, 2013 5:36 pm At this point it makes more practical sense to pick up an omnibus to cover a missing volume and get rid of the extra ones. I did this to get Vol. 9 since it was already OOP when I remembered to continue getting the manga because I haven't been reading it consistently.

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Fri Nov 01, 2013 12:24 pm I got 10 from amazon a month ago or something but as for 9 how did it become so rare? out of all the volumes did Viz only print a low number? its weird that 10 would be in stock and 9 is rare. I do have the 1st release for 1-6 the Special Edition for 7 and the small books for everything else (i don't have nine but I want to get it at a decent price sometime) and before getting 10 I got the Australian release of 10. I did get the omnibus and have all them and have started reading them. it might be my OCD wanting to keep and collect the singles as well as the 3 in1.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 01, 2013 2:07 pm ILUVASUKALANGLEY wrote: ...as for 9 how did it become so rare? out of all the volumes did Viz only print a low number?
